auto_update.desc: Run steamcmd app_update again every time the server starts.

keep_world_alive.desc: If true, the world keeps updating with no players online. If false, it loads on first join and unloads when empty.

password.desc: Set the server password. Leave blank for no password.

port.desc: What game port to bind the server to.

query_port.desc: Additional query port for server listing.

commands: sh -c 'mkdir -p /tmp/aska && until [ -f /tmp/aska/AskaServer.exe ]; do if [ -f /root/steamcmd/linux64/steamcmd ]; then box64 /root/steamcmd/linux64/steamcmd +@sSteamCmdForcePlatformType windows +login anonymous +app_info_print 3246670 +quit > /dev/null; else steamcmd +@sSteamCmdForcePlatformType windows +login anonymous +app_info_print 3246670 +quit > /dev/null; fi && box64 /root/steamcmd/linux64/steamcmd +@sSteamCmdForcePlatformType windows +force_install_dir /tmp/aska +login anonymous +app_update 3246670 validate +quit; if [ ! -f /tmp/aska/AskaServer.exe ]; then echo "SteamCMD failed or crashed, retrying..."; sleep 5; fi; done && cp -r /tmp/aska/. . && rm -rf /tmp/aska'

run.command: sh -c 'id -u aska >/dev/null 2>&1 || useradd -m aska || adduser -D aska; mkdir -p /home/aska/.steam/sdk64; if [ -f ./linux64/steamclient.so ]; then cp ./linux64/steamclient.so /home/aska/.steam/sdk64/; elif [ -f /root/steamcmd/linux64/steamclient.so ]; then cp /root/steamcmd/linux64/steamclient.so /home/aska/.steam/sdk64/; fi; chown -R aska:aska . /home/aska/.steam; if [ "${auto_update}" = "true" ]; then runuser -u aska -- sh -c "box64 /root/steamcmd/linux64/steamcmd +@sSteamCmdForcePlatformType windows +force_install_dir . +login anonymous +app_update 3246670 +quit"; fi; if [ ! -d /home/aska/.wine ]; then runuser -u aska -- env PATH="/wine-installer/bin:$PATH" WINEPREFIX="/home/aska/.wine" WINEDLLOVERRIDES="mscoree,mshtml=" wineboot --init; fi; exec runuser -u aska -- env PATH="/wine-installer/bin:$PATH" WINEPREFIX="/home/aska/.wine" xvfb-run --auto-servernum --server-args="-screen 0 640x480x24:32" box64 wine ./AskaServer.exe -propertiesPath "./server properties.txt"'
